label: OmniProject broker
info: Synchronous OmniProject broker binding. Import into Node-RED, deploy, then point BROKER_URL at http://<node-red-host>:1880/omniproject and run the OmniProject conformance suite. Handles the verify handshake + get_capabilities out of the box; wire the data actions to your backend via an HTTP Request node (see node-red-flow.md).

name: binding
